creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
textproc/zxing-cpp links with and has dependency on OpenCV:
> LIB_DEPENDS=    libopencv_core.so:graphics/opencv-core \
>                 libopencv_photo.so:graphics/opencv

Is is known what change triggered the problem?

I just updated textproc/zxing-cpp to the latest revision.
